sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_rdf (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, uri VARCHAR, data VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_rdf (id, uri, data) VALUES (1, 'http://example.com/resource1', 'data1');
INSERT INTO test_rdf (id, uri, data) VALUES (2, 'http://example.com/resource2', 'data2');
INSERT INTO test_rdf (id, uri, data) VALUES (3, 'http://example.com/resource3', NULL);
INSERT INTO test_rdf (id, uri, data) VALUES (4, 'http://example.com/resource4', 'data3');
INSERT INTO test_rdf (id, uri, data) VALUES (5, 'http://example.com/resource5', 'data4');
DB.DBA.TTLP_MT_LOCAL_FILE (CAST((SELECT data FROM test_rdf WHERE id = 1) AS VARCHAR), '', (SELECT uri FROM test_rdf WHERE id = 1));
SELECT SPARQL_DAWG_LOAD_REMOTE_DATFILE(CAST(CONCAT('http://example.com/resource', id) AS VARCHAR)) || '1.ttl' AS full_uri, 1) FROM test_rdf WHERE uri IS NOT NULL;
SELECT uri, COUNT(*) AS data_count FROM test_rdf WHERE data IS NOT NULL GROUP BY uri HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT id, uri FROM test_rdf WHERE (data IS NULL || data LIKE 'data%') AND uri IN (SELECT uri FROM test_rdf WHERE id > 2);
SELECT uri FROM test_rdf WHERE data IS NOT NULL ORDER BY data END AS sorting_order;
